title: MenuTune
description: Make the title music across versions!
body:
## Lets you hear **menu music from other Minecraft versions** while on the main menu of your current version!  
Beta's C418 tracks,1.16, 1.18, 1.20, 1.21 ,26.2, and more.

> Why isn't this feature in game?  
> Because there are already **way too many mods better than this one**! 😆

This mod is **lightweight** and **vanilla-friendly**, focusing entirely on menu music. You can:
- Add your own menu tracks(.ogg)
- Disable any song via the config screen
- Set the playback order


Compatibility: Works with most mods that **do not alter the main menu**. Feel free to modify the mod or include it in your modpack.


---
## 让你在**当前版本**的主菜单里听到**其他版本**的菜单曲！  
Beta 版的 C418, 1.16, 1.18, 1.20, 1.21 ,26.2, 等版本的菜单音乐。

> 不在游戏里提供功能？  
> 因为有太多比这个模组**更好**的模组了！😆

本模组**轻量**且**原版风格**，重点在于菜单曲。你可以：
- 自己添加菜单曲(.ogg)
- 在 config 界面禁用任意歌曲
- 自定义播放顺序

兼容性：与大部分**不改变主菜单**的模组兼容。你可以随意修改本模组，或者把它放进你的整合包中。
